title: Use variables to represent quantities and simple relationships
summary: Unit 3 variable-writing skill grounded in source-backed tasks on averages, prices, concentration, pattern rules, and quantity relationships.

title: Read the structure of algebraic expressions
summary: Unit 3 structure-reading skill grounded in source-backed questions about coefficients, constant terms, term counts, and like terms.

title: Evaluate algebraic expressions by substitution
summary: Unit 3 substitution skill grounded in source-backed evaluation tasks with signed numbers, fractions, powers, reciprocals, and grouping.

title: Simplify linear expressions with variables
summary: Unit 3 simplification skill grounded in source-backed tasks on parentheses, distributive structure, omitted operation symbols, and like-term combination.

title: Model and simplify contextual expressions
summary: Unit 3 contextual-modeling skill grounded in source-backed geometry, ratio, pattern, and word-problem expression tasks.
